_comment: Tracks the ISO timestamp of the most-recent successful digest broadcast per locale. send-digest.ts writes this on success; email-digest.yml commits it back so GHA runs have persistent state. Dry-runs DO NOT mutate this. See scripts/send-digest.ts::computeCutoffMs for the cutoff rule.
_seed_note: Re-seeded 2026-04-23 ~14:00 UTC after the original seed (2026-04-23T15:00:00Z) was a future timestamp — clock-skew guard correctly invalidated it, but caused 02:22 UTC cron to fall back to a 13h sliding window with too few articles to pass MIN_ARTICLES_TO_SEND. Re-seeded to a past timestamp; next 14:30 UTC cron will use 13h sliding window, then state advances on first successful send.
